description: ReportGenerator::with_obfuscate(true) masks phone numbers in rendered HTML
steps: Produce an ExtractionResult where sender_jid contains '6591234567@s.whatsapp.net'
Assert index.html contains '9****567' or '9**...' (middle digits masked)

description: Without obfuscation flag, full phone numbers appear in output
steps: Render the same ExtractionResult without with_obfuscate
Assert index.html contains the full '91234567' digits
